title: Claude Code Setup Checklist
summary: A printable beginner-safe checklist for installation, auth, and first-run validation.
whoItsFor: First-time learners setting up Claude Code on a real machine.
exampleUsage: Run through the checklist before your first builder session and again whenever a setup issue appears.

title: Builder Extension Pack Starter
summary: A starter bundle for one skill, one slash command, one hook, and one subagent.
whoItsFor: Learners who are ready to make their builder workflows reusable and repeatable.
exampleUsage: Save the starter pack into a project and customize each item for your team or workflow.

title: Prompt Makeover Pack
summary: Weak-to-strong prompt rewrite examples for builder, research, and grounding tasks.
whoItsFor: Learners building better prompting instincts for Claude-based workflows.
exampleUsage: Compare the weak and strong versions, then adapt the strong variants to your own project.

title: CLAUDE.md Template Library
summary: A collection of 8 ready-to-use CLAUDE.md templates for common project types: web app, data pipeline, CLI tool, research project, content creation, API service, security audit, and capstone portfolio.
whoItsFor: Any learner setting up a new project who wants a well-structured CLAUDE.md without starting from scratch.
exampleUsage: Copy the template that matches your project type and customize the restrictions and goals sections.

title: Portfolio Write-Up Template Pack
summary: Three portfolio write-up templates (project summary, case study, and one-page brief) for documenting CLI Academy work in a job-ready format.
whoItsFor: Learners completing Group 4 or 6 who want to turn their project work into employer-facing evidence.
exampleUsage: Use the project summary template for each Group 4 project. Use the one-page brief for job applications.

title: Debug Session Log Template
summary: A structured Markdown template for logging debug sessions: symptom, hypothesis, test, result, fix, and regression test location.
whoItsFor: Learners in Group 3 debug-first track who want a consistent format for debug documentation.
exampleUsage: Open a new DEBUG_LOG.md using this template whenever you start a debug session.

title: MCP Server Starter Template
summary: A minimal Node.js MCP server template with one sample tool, proper error handling, and a README explaining how to register it with Claude Desktop.
whoItsFor: Learners in Group 2.2 (MCP Server Setup) who want a working starting point for their first custom server.
exampleUsage: Clone the starter, rename the tool, swap in your data source, and register the server.

title: AI Developer Interview Question Bank
summary: 50 real interview questions for AI-adjacent developer roles, organized by topic: tool use, safety, architecture, team workflow, and business impact. Includes model answers for each.
whoItsFor: Learners in Group 6.2 (Job-Ready Brief) preparing for technical and behavioral interviews at companies using AI tooling.
exampleUsage: Work through 5-10 questions per day with Claude as your mock interviewer.
